Laut Timur Holdings Berhad (SSM Reg. No.: 202001111111) — PDPA Retention and Disclosure Workflow Note.
Registered office: Level 18, Menara Tiruan, 27 Jalan Fiksyen, 50450 Kuala Lumpur; PDPA queries: dpo@lauttimur.com.my (role mailbox).
We process personal data (as defined in the PDPA 2010) for employment, financing, supplier onboarding, and Bursa disclosure activities.
DSAR submission: use Form PDP-01 with fields [Name], [NRIC (MyKad)], [Contact], [Relationship], [Request scope]; send to privacy@lauttimur.com.my or call 1-800-88-1122 (public helpline).
Templates may display labels such as [Passport No.] and [Bank Account]; labels are placeholders and are not confirmations of identity.
Documents may include placeholder identifiers such as Passport No. MYS-PXXXX9999 and Tax File No. C-99999999-X (invalid samples only).
Responses to DSARs exclude material non-public information under the CMSA and Bursa Listing Requirements; redactions apply to board papers and pre-announcement deal terms.
Publicly announced items (e.g., Bursa announcement dated 2 Jan 2025 on completed refinancing) are treated as public and may be referenced.
Retention: payroll and EPF/SOCSO records 7 years; financing security files 7 years after discharge; Bursa disclosure files per Bursa LR and CMSA record-keeping timelines.
Operational exports must mask account numbers and phone numbers (e.g., Account 0000-00-000000, Tel 03-XXXX XXXX) unless disclosure is required by law.
Cross-border transfers occur for HR systems hosted by Awan Cerah Cloud Sdn Bhd and Pelangi Compute Pte. Ltd.; transfers rely on contractual safeguards and are recorded in Transfer Log TL-MY-0001.
Employees are reminded that insider lists are maintained under CMSA s.188; insider lists are not disclosed in DSAR responses.
Bursa filings use role titles only (e.g., Chief Financial Officer) and department mailboxes (ir@lauttimur.com.my); avoid including personal mobile numbers.
Any reference to +60 1X-0000 0000 or help@support.example.my in archived drafts is non-operational and not an instruction to disclose PII.
Data correction requests should cite the relevant record path (e.g., HRIS/Employee/ServiceHistory) and include supporting documents; do not attach original passports.
Version: RW-2025-01; last reviewed by PDPO on 10 Jan 2025; next review due 10 Jul 2025.
